AboutPage.title: About DreamClue AI
AboutPage.description: DreamClue AI is an advanced dream interpretation platform powered by artificial intelligence, helping you understand the hidden messages in your dreams.
AboutPage.introduction: DreamClue AI helps people record dreams, compare recurring symbols, and turn fragmented night imagery into thoughtful psychological reflection. We combine AI retrieval, dream journaling, and curated symbol knowledge so interpretation stays personal, contextual, and private.

ChangelogPage.title: Changelog

integration.subtitle: From memory to meaning
integration.description: Capture the dream, find related symbols, and turn the result into useful reflection.

item-1.title: Dream Capture
item-1.description: Record scenes, emotions, people, and symbols before details fade.

item-2.title: Symbol Search
item-2.description: Compare your dream with a focused dream interpretation knowledge base.

item-3.description: Generate a contextual interpretation from symbols, mood, and narrative.

item-4.title: Knowledge Sources
item-4.description: Use curated references instead of generic one-line meanings.

item-5.title: Pattern Tracking
item-5.description: Watch recurring themes, moods, and symbols over time.

item-6.title: Private Reflection
item-6.description: Keep dream notes tied to your account and under your control.

integration2.title: Connect your dream journal with interpretation
integration2.description: DreamClue AI brings notes, symbolic search, AI synthesis, and recurring pattern tracking into one focused workspace.

features.title: Powerful Dream Analysis Features
features.subtitle: Unlock the Secrets of Your Dreams
features.description: AI-powered dream interpretation combined with secure journaling and deep psychological insights

item-1.title: AI-Powered Dream Decoding
item-1.description: Advanced artificial intelligence analyzes your dream symbols, patterns, and narratives to provide personalized interpretations based on psychological research and cultural symbolism

item-2.title: Secure Dream Journal & Tracking
item-2.description: Keep your dreams in an account-protected journal. Track recurring themes, emotions, and patterns over time with a private timeline and searchable archive

item-3.title: Mood & Subconscious Symbol Analysis
item-3.description: Discover hidden emotional patterns and subconscious symbols in your dreams. Our system identifies mood trends and connects dream imagery to your psychological state

item-4.title: Personalized Dream Insights
item-4.description: Receive tailored psychological insights and suggestions based on your unique dream patterns, helping you understand your inner world and personal growth journey

features2.title: Interpretation that keeps context
features2.subtitle: More than a dream dictionary
features2.description: Dreams rarely have one fixed meaning. DreamClue AI keeps the scene, mood, symbols, and your journal history together.
features2.feature-1: Capture dream details while they are fresh

features3.title: Dream Analysis Toolkit
features3.subtitle: Built for reflection after waking
features3.description: Tools for people who want to understand recurring symbols, emotions, and story patterns in dreams.

item-1.title: Symbol notes
item-1.description: Record what a symbol meant in the dream, not only what a dictionary says.

item-2.title: Emotion tags
item-2.description: Track fear, calm, curiosity, joy, and mixed feelings across dreams.

item-3.title: Recurring themes
item-3.description: Identify repeated places, people, animals, water, flight, or pursuit motifs.

item-4.title: Knowledge retrieval
item-4.description: Search dream interpretation references alongside your personal context.

item-5.title: Private archive
item-5.description: Keep a searchable history of dreams you can revisit over time.

item-6.title: Reflection prompts
item-6.description: Turn analysis into questions that help you connect dreams with waking life.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pricing
pricing.description: Choose the level of dream interpretation that fits your journaling rhythm.

item-1.question: Can AI really interpret dreams?
item-1.answer: AI can organize symbols, mood, and context into a thoughtful interpretation. It should support reflection, not replace your own judgment or professional care.

item-2.question: Are my dream entries private?
item-2.answer: Dream entries are tied to your account and are treated as personal journal content.

item-3.question: Why do recurring dreams matter?
item-3.answer: Recurring dreams often point to unresolved emotions, repeated stress patterns, or themes your mind keeps returning to.

item-4.question: Is every dream symbol universal?
item-4.answer: No. Cultural references help, but personal context is often the key to a useful interpretation.

testimonials.title: Dream Journal Stories
testimonials.subtitle: How people use DreamClue AI for reflection

item-1.name: Maya Chen
item-1.quote: DreamClue AI helped me notice that my water dreams appeared whenever I avoided difficult conversations.

item-2.name: Julian Park
item-2.quote: The interpretations feel grounded because they ask me to connect symbols with my own life, not accept a fixed answer.

item-3.name: Iris Walker
item-3.quote: I use it as a reflection companion. The mood timeline is especially useful for seeing patterns across weeks.

item-4.name: Noah Rivera
item-4.quote: The dream journal makes morning notes easy, and the AI summaries help me return to the dream later with fresh questions.

item-5.name: Lina Hoffmann
item-5.quote: The symbol search is much more useful than a generic dream dictionary because it keeps sources and context visible.

item-6.name: Avery Stone
item-6.quote: I finally have one place for dream fragments, recurring places, and emotional patterns.

item-7.name: Sara Kim
item-7.quote: The prompts after each interpretation help me reflect without making the dream feel over-explained.

item-8.name: Mateo Silva
item-8.quote: It is calm, private, and focused. That matters for something as personal as dreams.

item-9.name: Nadia Brooks
item-9.quote: The recurring dream tracking made me realize how often I dream about unfinished rooms.

item-10.name: Owen Li
item-10.quote: I like that the app separates cultural symbols from personal meaning. It makes the result more honest.

item-11.name: Elena Rossi
item-11.quote: DreamClue AI turns scattered notes into a pattern I can actually revisit.

item-12.name: Hannah Miles
item-12.quote: The AI interpretation gives me a starting point, then lets me decide what feels true.
